chunks.text: March 11, 2026 - Eric Paulos elected to the ACM CHI Academy. The Association for Computing Machinery's Special Interest Group on Computer-Human Interaction (ACM SIGCHI) has elected Eric Paulos, Professor of Electrical Engineering and Computer Sciences, to the ACM CHI Academy. Paulos is one of eleven individuals inducted to the Academy this year. The CHI Academy recognizes leaders in human-computer interaction.
chunks.question: Who was elected to the ACM CHI Academy in March 2026?

chunks.text: March 11, 2026 - Sprawling new painting commemorates 150 years of women at UC Berkeley. The year 2020 marked the 150th anniversary of UC regents approving a resolution that young ladies be admitted into the University on equal terms in all respects with young men. The campus commemorated the anniversary with an extensive campus-wide history project that documented the legacy of women at Berkeley.
chunks.question: What does the new painting at UC Berkeley commemorate?
chunks.answer: 150 years of women at UC Berkeley.

chunks.text: February 18, 2026 - Aditi Krishnapriyan receives Department of Energy Early Career Award. Aditi Krishnapriyan, a faculty scientist in Berkeley Lab's Applied Mathematics and Computational Research Division (AMCR) and assistant professor at UC Berkeley, has been awarded a prestigious 2025 U.S. Department of Energy Early Career Research Program (ECRP) award. At UC Berkeley, Krishnapriyan has faculty appointments in the Department of Electrical Engineering and Computer Sciences.
chunks.question: Which award did Aditi Krishnapriyan receive in February 2026?
chunks.answer: Department of Energy Early Career Award.

chunks.text: February 18, 2026 - Tyler Hou named 2026 Hertz Fellowship Finalist. Math and CS student Tyler Hou was named a finalist for the 2026 Hertz Fellowship, one of the most prestigious and competitive awards in the nation for doctoral students in applied sciences, mathematics, and engineering. Selected from a pool of over 1,450 applicants, Hou is recognized for his academic achievements.
chunks.question: What recognition did Tyler Hou receive in February 2026?

chunks.text: February 17, 2026 - Three UC Berkeley EECS faculty named 2026 Sloan Fellows. Three early-career faculty in the UC Berkeley Department of Electrical Engineering and Computer Sciences (EECS) – Yuan Cao, Sarah E. Chasins, and John Wright – have been awarded prestigious 2026 Sloan Research Fellowships. This fellowship supports promising researchers early in their careers.
chunks.question: Which three EECS faculty were named Sloan Fellows in 2026?
chunks.answer: Yuan Cao, Sarah E. Chasins, John Wright.

chunks.text: February 13, 2026 - In Memoriam: Beresford Parlett (1932–2026). Beresford Parlett, a pioneer in numerical analysis and a foundational figure in the history of the Department of Electrical Engineering and Computer Sciences (EECS), died on Saturday, Feb. 7. He was 93. Parlett held a joint appointment in the Department of Mathematics and the EECS, representing the interdisciplinary nature of his work.
chunks.question: Who was Beresford Parlett and when did he pass away?

chunks.text: February 10, 2026 - Three Berkeley Engineering professors named to NAE. The National Academy of Engineering (NAE) announced today that three UC Berkeley Engineering faculty members — Ken Goldberg, Kam Lau and Felix Wu — have been elected to its ranks. The number of engineering faculty members in the NAE is now 74. Election to the NAE is among the highest professional distinctions accorded to an engineer.
chunks.question: Which three professors were elected to the NAE in February 2026?
chunks.answer: Ken Goldberg, Kam Lau, Felix Wu.

chunks.text: February 6, 2026 - Wentao Xu receives the Piezo MEMS Design Challenge Innovation Award. EECS graduate student Wentao Xu, member of Prof. Jessica Boles' research group, has received the Piezo MEMS Design Challenge Innovation Award at the IEEE MEMS 2026 International Conference. Wentao conducts research in power electronics and is currently exploring how piezoelectric resonators may be used in advanced applications.
chunks.question: What award did Wentao Xu win in February 2026?
chunks.answer: Piezo MEMS Design Challenge Innovation Award.

chunks.text: January 22, 2026 - CRA Outstanding Undergraduate Researcher Award recognizes EECS. Three EECS undergraduates have been recognized by the Computing Research Association (CRA) in this year's prestigious Outstanding Undergraduate Researcher Awards. Student Recognition Nominator Victoria Phelps Finalist Dan Garcia Tyler Hou Honorable Mention Max Willsey Kelly Tou Honorable Mention Kris Pister The CRA noted that these students demonstrated exceptional research potential.
chunks.question: How many EECS undergraduates were recognized by CRA in January 2026?

chunks.text: January 21, 2026 - Sylvia Ratnasamy named 2025 ACM Fellow. The Association for Computing Machinery (ACM) has named Sylvia Ratnasamy, Professor of Computer Science at UC Berkeley, to its 2025 class of ACM Fellows. Ratnasamy is being recognized for contributions to networks and networked systems. Ratnasamy is widely known for her seminal work on distributed systems and network architecture.
chunks.question: Why was Sylvia Ratnasamy named an ACM Fellow in 2025?
chunks.answer: Contributions to networks and networked systems.
